ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Number of the season */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode within the season */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the episode */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the episode streaming */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the episode */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the episode */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the episode thumbnail */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the episode is part of a premium subscription */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewers" (
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewer account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the viewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the viewer for notifications */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the viewer registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the viewer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the viewer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the viewer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the viewer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the viewer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the viewer's profile picture */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the viewer is a subscriber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the comment pertains to */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewer who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the comment */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES viewers ("viewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the episode */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the episode */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the episode was shared */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Total comments received for the episode */,
  "average_watch_time" TEXT /* Average time viewers spent watching the episode */,
  "drop_off_rate" REAL /* Rate at which viewers stop watching the episode */,
  "demographic_data" TEXT /* Demographic data of viewers (age, gender, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director for communication */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the director is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer for communication */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the producer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the producer is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director associated with the episode */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer associated with the episode */,
  "role" TEXT /* Specific role of the contributor (e.g., director, producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_contributors_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_contributors_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_contributors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being promoted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the promotion is active (e.g., social media, website) */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., social media ad, email campaign) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the promotion */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the promotion received */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions (e.g., new subscriptions, views) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewer */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES viewers ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewer */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES viewers ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the viewer (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES viewers ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "viewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the viewer */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "watch_time" TEXT /* Time viewer spent watching the episode */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the viewer watched the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewer_engagement_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewer_engagement_viewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("viewer_id") REFERENCES viewers ("viewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_locations_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_genres_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
